zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Meade V於1489年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特維德莫時，他的父親Thomas Meade IV40歲，母親Johanna25歲。他於1519年與Joan Wycliffe在英國薩默塞特維德莫結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1557年之前在英國英格蘭艾可格亞特 伊斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Meade
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: habitational name from Midheach, the Gaelic name of County Meath in Ireland. Its Anglicized forms are now indistinguishable from those of the English name Mead .

variants.name: Mead
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived by a meadow, from Middle English mede ‘meadow’ (Old English mǣd), or a habitational name from one or more of the many places so named, such as Meads in Harford (Devon).
perhaps from Middle English mede ‘mead, alcoholic drink of fermented honey and water’, possibly denoting one who was fond of the drink or who made or sold mead. Compare Meader .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Meade V was born in 1489, in Wedmore, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Meade IV, was 40 and his mother, Johanna, was 25. He married Joan Wycliffe in 1519, in Wedmore, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. He died before 1557, in Great Easton, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Meade Vが1489年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトウエドモーで生まれた時，父Thomas Meade IVは40歳，母Johannaは25歳であった。1519年にイギリスソメルセトウエドモーでJoan Wycliffeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1557年以前にイギリスイギリスエセックスグレアト エアストンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Meade V(이)가 1489년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 w드모어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Meade IV(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1519년 영국 서머세트 w드모어에서 Joan Wycliffe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1557년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 그리트 이스트에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Meade V родился в 1489 г. в местности ведмор, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Meade IV было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna, 25. Он умер перед 1557 г. в местности грит эастон, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
